subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath been mentioned in the Book, who hath turned unto Our horizon, who hath arisen to serve Our Cause, and who hath spoken forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن کان مذکورا فی کتاب من اقبل الی افقی و قام علی خدمه امری و نطق
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @prophecy and fulfillment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transcendence; unknowability of God
